overall.description: First-person driving footage through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077 during a rainy night. The vehicle navigates through neon-lit commercial streets, covered underpasses, and busy intersections with moderate traffic and wet road reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with green neon lighting

events.description: exits covered underpass into open rainy street with neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: driving through covered tunnel with green neon lighting, accelerating toward the exit

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and green lighting fixtures
continuous green neon tubes lining the tunnel walls and ceiling
thick structural pillars supporting the underpass ceiling
bright exit opening showing rainy street and city lights beyond

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered urban underpass illuminated by green neon strip lights. The vehicle drives straight through the tunnel, passing concrete pillars, and exits around the 12-second mark into the open rainy night where neon-lit buildings become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with neon signage and storefronts

events.description: approaches red traffic light and stops behind other vehicles

agents.ego_description: driving through open commercial streets, slowing down and stopping at a red traffic light

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped ahead at the red traffic light

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and ground-floor storefronts
various colorful neon advertisements and business signs in Japanese characters
large glowing screens displaying advertisements high on building facades
overhead traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges into an open commercial street lined with multi-story buildings featuring bright neon signs and digital billboards. Rain falls steadily on the wet asphalt as the vehicle approaches and stops at a red traffic light around 25 seconds, waiting behind other vehicles while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with weapon shop and neon signage

events.description: turns left at intersection, passing by prominent neon signs

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the traffic light and executing a left turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: large blue neon sign reading 'RIFLES & PISTOLS' on building facade
bright yellow-green neon sign with stylized text
angled building facade at the intersection with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates from the stopped position and navigates through the intersection, making a left turn around 32 seconds. Prominent neon signage including a 'RIFLES & PISTOLS' sign and 'YAKEDA' sign illuminate the scene as the vehicle turns past pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with multiple intersections

events.description: navigates through intersection with slight turn adjustment

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial avenue, navigating intersections and passing other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large vertical digital displays showing advertisements with pink and blue neon glow
traffic signs and directional markers on metal poles
glowing reflections of neon lights on the rain-soaked pavement

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues down a wide commercial avenue lined with towering neon billboards and digital displays. The wet road surface creates vibrant reflections of the pink and blue neon lights. The vehicle navigates through intersections while following a black sedan through the moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed commercial buildings and crosswalks

events.description: navigates another turn while passing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: making multiple turns through city blocks, navigating around corners and crosswalks

entered.detail: traffic barriers, bollards, and street furniture along the sidewalk
ground-level shop fronts with illuminated signage and display windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle navigating through multiple turns across city blocks, passing by street infrastructure and commercial facades. The vehicle makes a right turn around 65 seconds and continues through the neon-lit streets, with fewer pedestrians visible and sparse traffic ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a confined, neon-lit underpass into the expansive, rainy commercial heart of Night City. It begins within a covered urban tunnel illuminated by green neon strip lights, moving past concrete pillars before emerging into the open night. As the vehicle exits the underpass, the scene opens up to a street lined with multi-story buildings and digital billboards, where the camera slows to a halt at a red traffic light amidst steady rain and wet asphalt reflections. The vehicle then accelerates through the intersection, making a left turn that brings the camera past waiting pedestrians and under the glow of prominent RIFLES & PISTOLS and YAKEDA neon signs.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a vibrant commercial district that gradually transitions from a crowded neon avenue into quieter, winding city blocks. It begins by cruising down a wide thoroughfare lined with towering digital billboards, where the wet asphalt mirrors the vivid pink and blue glow of the surrounding displays. As the vehicle follows a black sedan through moderate traffic and busy intersections, the dense commercial atmosphere persists through the reflections on the road. The scene then shifts as the camera navigates a series of turns across several city blocks, passing by various street infrastructures and commercial facades. Finally, the environment opens up into less congested streets with sparse traffic and fewer pedestrians, maintaining the neon-lit nocturnal mood.
